**提交前请确认 / Please confirm before submitting**:

- [ ] 我已搜索现有 Issue，确认这不是重复报告 / I have searched existing issues, this is not a duplicate
- [ ] 我已运行 `dart analyze lib`，无 0 error（或附上 analyze 输出）/ I ran `dart analyze lib` with 0 errors (or attached analyze output)
- [ ] 我已移除日志中的所有敏感信息 / I have removed all sensitive information from logs
